title: Boss Tosk
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Boss}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Boss_Tosk.jpg]] |name=Boss Tosk
Attacking an individual with the help of two droids |homeworld=[[Columus/Legends|Columus]]''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' |birth= |death= |species=[[Columi/Legends|Columi]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |height=1.5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jalk Syndicate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Boss Tosk''' was a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] and leader of the [[Jalk Syndicate]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was a [[Columi/Legends|Columi]] and as such had a large overdeveloped head with bulbous [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and a diminutive body. He achieved locomotion by the use of a [[Repulsor suit|repulsorsuit]] and the help of numerous [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]]. ==Biography== The Jalk Syndicate operated in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and Boss Tosk's hideout was located in the [[Cor III system/Legends|Cor III system]], [[Barnaba Province]]. The Tosk was a solitary individual and preferred to seek seclusion in this hideout where he controlled the operations of the syndicate using super computers and with the help of numerous servant and worker droids. These droids performed the tasks that Boss Tosk was not able to physically perform due to the weakness of his frail body. With the apparent [[Cleansing of the Nine Houses|fall]] of the [[Mecrosa Order]], the Jalk Syndicate rose to take their place as [[House Mecetti]]'s primary underground operator. With the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], House Mecetti, eager to impress, paid Boss Tosk to close his operation down. The Tosk feigned the shutdown of his operations but in reality he forged a new alliance with [[House Barnaba]]. ==Sources== *''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tosk, Boss}} [[Category:Businesspeople]] [[Category:Columi]] [[Category:Crime lords]] [[Category:Males]]
